name: Compost Bin Stainless Steel - Brightroom™
description:
Sleek and eco-friendly, this Compost Bin Stainless Steel from Brightroom™ has a 1.23-gallon capacity, perfectly sized for storing daily food scraps. With it's sleek design place it on a kitchen counter or under the sink. It's rectangular and made from fingerprint-resistant stainless steel, and it features a removable liner for quick emptying and a lid to keep the contents secured and repel odors. Spot or wipe clean for simple maintenance.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
